pair.title: Pair with Veloryn
pair.subtitle: Open Veloryn in your browser, go to Profile → Mobile Devices and scan the generated QR code.
pair.scanInstructions: Point the camera at the QR code
pair.permissionDenied: Camera access denied. Enable it in system settings.
pair.qrExpired: QR code expired. Generate a new one in the Veloryn panel.
